comments.author: Alone-Ad2836
comments.body: That looks like my nervous system if I did that 😳

comments.author: redtehk17
comments.body: What's the Sharpe and net profit tho?

replies.author: Patient-Knowledge915
replies.body: To give you an idea! You have a list that 70.2% of the stocks on the list are going up! average profits for me, the last 4 months per month is over 35% and better. A better trader than me can do way better. All my trades are in autopilot, meaning I set a target , target hits, and it sells automatically money frees up, and I  move to the next trade. A trader  more aggressive than me can make way better by being on top of his trades.

replies.author: redtehk17
replies.body: What do you mean a better trader than me, this is all automated no? So your performance should be indicative of anyone using it. What is discretionary about your model?

replies.author: Patient-Knowledge915
replies.body: If you have the talent and execute better than me  getting the max out of most or all  trades, you will make way better than me ! I trade with a preset target. If it goes over, I dont make the extra gain
